description: Plugin-distributed hooks for auth-identity. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 6 mechanically-detectable end-user-auth/identity anti-patterns (token-in-localStorage, Implicit flow, wildcard redirect_uri, unverified JWT decode, hardcoded secret, cookie without HttpOnly). Heuristic, not a security review. Set AUTH_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
